hook.text: UNITED OPEN TALKS TO SIGN SUMMERVILLE

beats.text: ROMANO AND ORNSTEIN BOTH CONFIRM THE APPROACH
A FIVE-YEAR DEAL HAS BEEN OFFERED TO THE DUTCH WINGER
WEST HAM WANT £50M AS PART OF A DOUBLE RAID

caption: It's now OFFICIAL talks 🔴 Manchester United have gone from enquiry to opening formal talks with West Ham for Crysencio Summerville — confirmed by both Fabrizio Romano AND David Ornstein. United have tabled a five-year deal to the Dutch winger and are pursuing a stunning double raid on West Ham alongside Mateus Fernandes. West Ham want £50m for Summerville, who lit up the World Cup with a goal for the Netherlands. PSG are also circling — time is running out. Do you want Summerville at Old Trafford? 👇 REPORTED — per Fabrizio Romano / David Ornstein. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
